text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize that I left something behind at training
yesterday, so I head to the field to get it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yayyy! I win! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Grr! I thought I had you that time!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hmph! I'm gonna win the next one for sure!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All right! Let me know next time you wanna try! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! What are you doing here so early?
choice_data_list: I forgot something. How about you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Mmm, hard to explain. Making friends? Kinda?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I noticed this really good racer recently, but when
I tried talking to her...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey! We raced together the other day, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah. And you are...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm Tokai Teio! The invincible monarch who's
gonna overthrow the Emperor!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I thought you looked sooo cool when you
overtook everyone! Wanna race sometime?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Uh, what?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Come on! Pleeease! I promise it'll be super fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I can't believe I lost...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That was mega fun, right? I knew you were
gonna put up a good fight!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Is this all just fun and games to you?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
This isn't over... You better race me again! And
brace yourself, 'cause next time it won't just be
for "fun"!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Yeah, count me in!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, if we're gonna be racing more, why don't we
hang out and get to know each other better? ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You know what they say: "Rivals on the track,
friends off the track!"

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I've never heard that saying in my life.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, now you have! C'mon, let's grab some mini
parfaits from the cafeteria. ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Let go of meee!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, we've been racing each other in our free
time ever since.
choice_data_list: Sounds like you made a good friend.
Sounds like you made a good friend.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, we've been racing each other in our free
time ever since.
choice_data_list: Sounds like you made a good friend.
Sounds like you made a good friend.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's not it. I'm just having fun! I get so excited
when I'm up against a tough opponent!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I've gotten to know her, and sometimes we
hang out together!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: More races, and more friends! What's not to love? ♪
choice_data_list: Just don't go too crazy, all right?
Just don't go too crazy, all right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm doing fine! It takes way more than this to wear me out!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: We're gonna run on dirt next! Ooh, I can't wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, it looks like Tokai Teio's new friend has
been a good influence on her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yep!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and the other day, she told me the secret to
pulling away from the pack!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I forgot the details, but basically you gotta slip into an opening like whoop, then break away like whoosh, then you go like vavoosh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoop, whoosh, vavoosh! Duh! Oh, I can't wait to try it out in my next race! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I didn't quite understand the so-called secret...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But, well, it looks like Tokai Teio's new friend has
been a good influence on her.
